---
title: "Aquaculture Resilience Evidence Engine"
format: html
---

AREE converts public aquaculture omics studies into harmonized, comparable evidence for resilience-associated biomarker discovery.

The MVP focuses on *Crassostrea gigas* and demonstrates study registration, processed-result harmonization, cross-study meta-analysis, candidate scoring, and evidence-card generation using simulated data.

## Run the Demo

```bash
aree harmonize-demo
aree meta-analyze --phenotype thermal_tolerance --feature-type gene
aree build-evidence-cards --phenotype survival
aree build-demo-report
```

## Guardrail

AREE identifies associations and evidence convergence. It does not claim that single-study significant features are validated biomarkers.
